assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 8-9 show the exact JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present as filter conditions.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 27-28 under 'Stream Matching': "Current issue stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1] (stream 2.1.x)" and "TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) -- matches the current issue's stream". The output explicitly checks the task summary text for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 39-43 show the link creation call: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend"). The link topology diagram on lines 86-88 confirms: "TC-8021 (CVE Jira, stream rhtpa-2.1) +-- Depend --> TC-8022 (remediation task, rhtpa-2.1)". Line 46 states this "establishes the standard remediation linkage".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 51-58 show the label update: current_labels includes 'security-preemptive', updated_labels does not, and jira.edit_issue is called with labels excluding 'security-preemptive'. Line 59 confirms: "The security-preemptive label is removed because TC-8022 is now linked to a proper CVE Jira (TC-8021) via the Depend link type. It is no longer a preemptive task -- it is a standard remediation task."

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md line 72: "Skipping new remediation task creation in Step 8." Line 77: "Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream." triage-outcome.md lines 33-34: "Because the reconciliation in Step 4.4 identified TC-8022 as the existing remediation task for this stream, Step 8 (Remediation) does not create new tasks." triage-outcome.md line 45: "No new remediation tasks are created".
